description: You can execute these commands from the Cortex XSOAR CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.
name: phishlabs-ioc-eir-get-incidents

outputs.description: Incident reason type PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Classification Incident classification
outputs.name: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.CaseType

outputs.description: Detailed classification PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Severity Incident severity
outputs.name: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.SubClassification

outputs.description: Email submission method PhishLabsIOC.EIR.FurtherReviewReason Incident further review reason
outputs.name: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.SubmissionMethod

outputs.description: Id of incident PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Title Title of reported incident
outputs.name: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.ID

outputs.description: Description of reporeted incident PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Status Status of reported incident
outputs.name: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Description

outputs.description: Date Date of incident creation PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Modified
outputs.name: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Created

outputs.description: Date of incident last modified PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Closed Date
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Duration Duration until closing incident in seconds PhishLabsIOC.EIR.EmailReportedBy
outputs.name: Date of incident closing

outputs.description: User who reported the incident PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Email.EmailBody Email body
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Email sender PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Email.URL.URL Url found in body
outputs.name: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Email.Sender

outputs.description: Is the url malicious? PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Email.URL.MaliciousDomain Is the url domain malicious?
outputs.name: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Email.URL.Malicious

outputs.description: Name of the attached file PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Email.Attachment.MimeType Attachemt mime type
outputs.name: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Email.Attachment.FileName

outputs.description: Attachemt md5 hash PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Email.Attachment.SHA256 Attachemt sha256 hash
outputs.name: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Email.Attachment.MD5

outputs.description: Is the file malicious? Email.To The recipient of the email.
outputs.name: PhishLabsIOC.EIR.Email.Attachment.Malicious

outputs.description: The sender of the email. Email.Body/HTML The plain-text version of the email.
outputs.name: Email.From

outputs.description: The full file name (including file extension). File.SHA256 The SHA256 hash of the file.
outputs.name: File.Name

outputs.description: The MD5 hash of the file. File.Malicious.Vendor The vendor that reported the file as malicious.
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: A description explaining why the file was determined to be malicious. URL.Data The URL
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: The vendor reporting the URL as malicious. URL.Malicious.Description A description of the malicious URL.
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested. DBotScore.Type The indicator type.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The vendor used to calculate the score. DBotScore.Score The actual score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
